title: VerifyPermitRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-verify-permit. Authorization is carried in the `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header.

permit_token.description: The permit_token returned by a prior /v1-evaluate call.

actor_id.description: Optional binding check. Server denies with ACTOR_MISMATCH if this does not match the actor_id on the original evaluation.

action_type.description: Optional binding check. Server denies with ACTION_TYPE_MISMATCH if this does not match the action_type on the original evaluation.

traceparent.description: W3C traceparent for body-level trace propagation.
